title: Create innovative web application with unique visual identity

requirements.text: Create a visually striking landing page with an unconventional, modern design that breaks away from typical corporate aesthetics
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page displays with a cohesive, distinctive visual theme
Design uses contemporary layout patterns and visual hierarchy
Color palette and typography create a memorable first impression

requirements.text: Implement an interactive feature showcase section demonstrating dynamic content capabilities
acceptanceCriteria: User interactions provide immediate visual feedback
Content updates smoothly without page reloads

requirements.text: Build a backend data model supporting user-generated content with basic CRUD operations
acceptanceCriteria: Motoko actor implements create, read, update, and delete functions

requirements.text: Connect frontend to backend with React Query for seamless data fetching and mutations
acceptanceCriteria: Loading and error states display appropriately
Data updates reflect in UI immediately after mutations

requirements.text: Apply a bold, innovative design direction featuring warm coral and deep teal tones with geometric patterns and asymmetric layouts, creating a fresh aesthetic that emphasizes whitespace and modern typography
acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme uses coral (#FF6B6B or similar) and teal (#2D9CDB or similar) as primary colors
Layout incorporates geometric shapes and asymmetric content placement
Typography uses modern sans-serif fonts with varied weights
Design maintains consistency across all pages and components

constraints: Use only React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and React Query for frontend
Backend must be implemented as a single Motoko actor
Do not modify Internet Identity integration hooks

required: Abstract geometric hero background with coral and teal gradients (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Minimalist icon set for feature showcase, geometric style (feature-icon-1.dim_64x64.png)
Minimalist icon set for feature showcase, geometric style (feature-icon-2.dim_64x64.png)
Minimalist icon set for feature showcase, geometric style (feature-icon-3.dim_64x64.png)
